rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Protective Order Regarding The Deposition And Videotaped Trial Preservation Testimony Of Plaintiffs¿ Expert Witness, Kenneth Cohen
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, November 3, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion for protective order regarding the deposition and videotaped trial preservation testimony of Plaintiffs¿ expert Kenneth Cohen is denied. Plaintiffs have failed to show good cause to issue a protective order pursuant to CCP 2025.420. If a hearing is requested it will be at 11:45am, not 9:30am. = (503/TLJ)
